description: LEAP product overview — daily volumes, transcribed minutes, tenant health, and red flags. Top row is fixed 24h; trends honour the dashboard time picker.

panels.title: Active users
panels.description: Distinct users who created at least one recording in the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS value FROM recordings WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

panels.title: New recordings
panels.description: Recordings created in the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM recordings WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

panels.title: Transcribed minutes
panels.description: Total audio/video minutes transcribed in the last 24 hours (sum of final_duration after TRANSCRIBE completed).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(q.minutes), 0), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (st.recording_id) (r.final_duration / 60.0) AS minutes FROM stage_timings st JOIN recordings r ON r.id = st.recording_id WHERE st.stage_type = 'TRANSCRIBE' AND st.status = 'COMPLETED' AND st.substep IS NULL AND st.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND r.final_duration IS NOT NULL AND r.final_duration > 0 ORDER BY st.recording_id, st.completed_at DESC) q;

panels.title: Successful uploads
panels.description: Output targets marked UPLOADED in the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM output_targets WHERE status = 'UPLOADED' AND uploaded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

panels.title: Pipeline success rate
panels.description: Share of recordings created in the last 24h that reached READY or UPLOADED without failure.

targets.rawSql: WITH w AS (SELECT * FROM recordings WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('READY','UPLOADED') AND NOT failed) / COUNT(*) END AS value FROM w;

panels.title: Recordings per day
panels.description: New recordings grouped by calendar day.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS value FROM recordings WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Transcribed minutes per day
panels.description: Minutes of content transcribed per day (final_duration after TRANSCRIBE completed).

targets.rawSql: SELECT sub.day AS time, ROUND(SUM(sub.minutes), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (st.recording_id, date_trunc('day', st.completed_at)) date_trunc('day', st.completed_at) AS day, (r.final_duration / 60.0) AS minutes FROM stage_timings st JOIN recordings r ON r.id = st.recording_id WHERE st.stage_type = 'TRANSCRIBE' AND st.status = 'COMPLETED' AND st.substep IS NULL AND $__timeFilter(st.completed_at) AND r.final_duration IS NOT NULL AND r.final_duration > 0 ORDER BY st.recording_id, date_trunc('day', st.completed_at), st.completed_at DESC) sub GROUP BY sub.day ORDER BY sub.day;

panels.title: Uploads per day by platform
panels.description: Successful uploads stacked by target platform.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', uploaded_at) AS time, target_type::text AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM output_targets WHERE status = 'UPLOADED' AND $__timeFilter(uploaded_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Top users by recordings
panels.description: Ten most active users in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT u.email, COUNT(r.*) AS recordings, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r.final_duration), 0)::numeric / 60, 1) AS content_min FROM recordings r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(r.created_at) GROUP BY u.email ORDER BY recordings DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Upload success rate by platform
panels.description: Percentage of output targets that reached UPLOADED status.

targets.rawSql: SELECT target_type::text AS platform, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'UPLOADED') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS success_pct FROM output_targets WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;

panels.title: Stuck recordings (>2h in same status)
panels.description: Active recordings that have not progressed for more than two hours (excludes paused).

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, user_id, status, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - updated_at) / 3600, 1) AS hours_stuck, display_name FROM recordings WHERE status NOT IN ('READY', 'UPLOADED', 'EXPIRED', 'SKIPPED') AND NOT failed AND NOT deleted AND NOT on_pause AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' ORDER BY hours_stuck DESC LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Failed recordings by stage (24h)
panels.description: Where the pipeline failed in the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(failed_at_stage, 'unknown') AS stage, COUNT(*) AS failures FROM recordings WHERE failed AND failed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;

title: LEAP Overview
